text:
うむ、特訓内容は合格だ。
順調に昇っているようだな
はるかな高みへの階段を。

精進を忘れず、驕りもせずに
愚直に努力を続けていれば
君ならばきっと辿り着けるだろう。

そう……誰もが夢見る
ワイヤードランス使いの頂点へ。
それまで、

Yes, you've passed. And taken another step up
an already impressive mountain of achievement.

I think, if you keep your head on straight and
don't lose focus or get too proud, you've got a
real shot of seeing the summit.

Don't give up now, operative! You can scale
that mountain, become the Wired Lance
master so many only dream of being!
